reviews.comment:

When I needed them after getting stuck on the road, they didn't help me. I disappeared!

reviews.comment:
Después de 22 años como socio es una lastima sentirme decepcionado por la actitud soberbia de uno de los playeros, que no solo me dejo plantado mas de 7 minutos para cargar nafta por comer un sandwich (sin darse cuenta que había bebes en el interior del auto), sino que no me dejo pagar con la aplicación de MP porque colgó el pico en el surtidor sin preguntarme con que iba a pagar y según él no se podía después de eso... una lastima que los empleados no se den cuenta que están para atención al publico y si uno los trata con el respeto que se merecen uno espera lo mismo. Repito, totalmente decepcionado. Una lastima no haber puesto una reseña en el libro de quejas para que estén mas atentos los superiores.

(Translated by Google)
After 22 years as a member, it's a shame to feel disappointed by the arrogant attitude of one of the gas station attendants. He not only kept me waiting for over 7 minutes to fill up my tank because he was eating a sandwich (without realizing there were babies in the car), but he also wouldn't let me pay with the Mercado Pago app because he hung the nozzle on the pump without asking how I was going to pay, and according to him, it wasn't possible after that... It's a shame that the employees don't realize they're there to serve the public, and if you treat them with the respect they deserve, you expect the same in return. I repeat, completely disappointed. It's a shame I didn't write a comment in the complaints book so that the supervisors would be more attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdExUYjZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El baño está muy limpio.
Estacionamiento amplio, y mucha bija.
También rompen bien el orto.

The bathroom is very clean.
Ample parking, and plenty of girls.
They also give great head.

reviews.comment:
Una YPF clásica, atienden cómo es todos lados con descuento del 5% para socios del ACA por eso a veces hay unas colas infernales...

(Translated by Google)
A classic YPF station, they serve customers like everywhere else, with a 5% discount for ACA members, which is why there are sometimes incredibly long lines...

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
With 40 years of experience as an ACA dealership and workshop, we are considered a leader in diagnostics and repair. The ACA Guarantee.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, pero la mayoría de las veces se complica hacer la fila por como están distribuidos los surtidores. Te podes ir en 2 minutos o en 15, dependiendo del día.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, but most of the time the line is difficult to get in because of how the pumps are arranged. You can leave in 2 minutes or 15, depending on the day.
